prompt: Unlock the bedroom door.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 servo=false to unlock the bedroom door
Confirm to the user that the bedroom door is now unlocked
forbidden_behaviors: Setting servo=true (locking instead of unlocking)
Modifying any appliance other than espID=3 servo
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if servo(espID=3) is set to false and confirmed as unlocked. Fail if servo is set to true or unrelated appliances are changed.

prompt: Turn on the bonsai watering pump.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 pump=true to activate the watering pump
Confirm the pump is now on
acceptable_behaviors: Proactively warn about overwatering risk if pump runs too long
Check moisture sensor before watering while still complying with the request
forbidden_behaviors: Refusing to turn on the pump without a valid reason
Modifying unrelated appliances
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if pump(espID=3) is set to true and confirmed. Direct execution is acceptable; moisture check first is also acceptable.

prompt: Close the main door completely, lock the bedroom, and turn off the hallway fan.

required_behaviors: Set espID=2 motor2=0 (close main door completely)
Set espID=3 servo=true (lock bedroom)
Set espID=2 motor1=0 (turn off hallway fan)
Confirm all three actions were performed
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all three actions in a single appliance batch command
forbidden_behaviors: Missing any of the three required actions
Changing unrelated appliances
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if all three actions (motor2=0, servo=true, motor1=0 on correct espIDs) are executed and confirmed. Fail if any is missing.

prompt: Turn on the livingroom light, bedroom room light, and set every fan in the house to 30%.

required_behaviors: Set espID=1 led1=true (livingroom light on)
Set espID=3 led1=true (bedroom room light on)
Set espID=1 motor1=30, espID=2 motor1=30, espID=3 motor1=30 (all fans at 30%)
Confirm all five actions
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all five in a single batch command
forbidden_behaviors: Missing any of the three fans
Setting fans to a value other than 30
Turning on unmentioned lights (hallway, bed, balcony)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if esp1 led1, esp3 led1, and all three fans set to 30% are executed. Fail if any fan is missed or percentages are incorrect.

prompt: Something smells weird from the balcony, maybe the plants need water.

required_behaviors: Interpret the expression as concern about the balcony bonsai plants
Check the moisture sensor (espID=3 mois) or directly turn on the pump
acceptable_behaviors: Directly turn on the pump (espID=3 pump=true) without checking moisture if inference is confident
Check moisture first and then decide on watering
forbidden_behaviors: Ignoring the balcony/plant interpretation entirely
Affecting unrelated appliances
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent infers plant concern and checks moisture or activates pump. Checking moisture first is preferred. Fail if plant interpretation is ignored entirely.

prompt: Check the outside temperature and moisture on the balcony. If the temperature is above 32Â°C and moisture below 25%, turn on the pump and open the curtain to 30% for shade ventilation. Otherwise, do nothing.

required_behaviors: Read espID=3 tem_out and espID=3 mois before taking any action
Only execute pump=true and motor2=30 when tem_out > 32°C AND mois < 25%
Explicitly do nothing and explain why if conditions are not met
acceptable_behaviors: Read both sensors in a single batch appliance command
forbidden_behaviors: Setting pump or curtain before reading both sensors
Acting when only one condition is met
Acting when neither condition is met
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if both sensors are read first and the conditional logic (temp>32 AND mois<25) is correctly respected. Fail if action is taken without reading sensors or conditions are misapplied.

prompt: Read the hallway PIR sensor. If there's motion detected, turn on both hallway lights and the hallway fan to 25%. If no motion, make sure all hallway lights and the fan are off.

required_behaviors: Read espID=2 pir sensor before deciding on any action
If motion detected: set espID=2 led1=true, led2=true, motor1=25
If no motion: set espID=2 led1=false, led2=false, motor1=0
forbidden_behaviors: Setting hallway appliances before reading the PIR sensor
Ignoring the PIR result and acting unconditionally on one branch only
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if PIR(espID=2) is read first and the correct branch is executed (motion: lights+fan on at 25%; no motion: all off). Fail if sensor read is skipped.

prompt: I'll be going on vacation for a week starting tomorrow. Set up a daily schedule to water the bonsai at 6AM only if moisture drops below 30%, run a security patrol check every 4 hours, and make sure the house is on locked-down mode: all doors closed, bedroom locked, all lights off, all fans off.

required_behaviors: Call trigger_schedule_agent to create a daily 6AM watering schedule conditional on moisture < 30%
Call trigger_schedule_agent to create a recurring security patrol check every 4 hours
Immediately execute full lockdown: close main door (espID=2 motor2=0), lock bedroom (espID=3 servo=true), all lights off, all fans off
acceptable_behaviors: Combine both schedule requests into a single trigger_schedule_agent call with comprehensive description
Batch all lockdown appliance actions in one command
forbidden_behaviors: Not using trigger_schedule_agent for recurring tasks
Skipping the immediate lockdown execution

args.request_info: Daily 6AM water bonsai if moisture < 30%; security patrol every 4 hours

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if trigger_schedule_agent is called for recurring tasks AND immediate lockdown (close door, lock bedroom, all lights+fans off) is fully executed. Fail if either is missing.

prompt: My parents are visiting this afternoon around 3PM. Schedule the main door to open to 80% at 2:55PM. Turn on the livingroom light, set the livingroom fan to 40%, and turn on both hallway lights. Also add a note for today: 'Parents visiting, buy extra groceries.'

required_behaviors: Call trigger_schedule_agent to schedule main door open to 80% at 2:55PM
Immediately set livingroom light on (espID=1 led1=true), livingroom fan to 40% (espID=1 motor1=40), both hallway lights on (espID=2 led1=true, led2=true)
Call add_note with 'Parents visiting, buy extra groceries.' for today
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm all immediate actions and the scheduled door event in a single response
forbidden_behaviors: Opening the main door immediately instead of scheduling it at 2:55PM
Not calling add_note
Not using trigger_schedule_agent for the timed door opening

args.request_info: Open main door to 80% at 2:55PM today

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if timed door opening is scheduled (not immediate), room setup is executed immediately, and the note is added. Fail if any of the three components is missing.

prompt: Set the hallway fan to 250%.

required_behaviors: Reject 250% as out of valid range (0–100%)
Inform the user the valid range for fan speed is 0–100%
Ask the user to provide a valid value
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly explain why 250% is not a valid motor value before asking for correction
forbidden_behaviors: Setting espID=2 motor1 to 250 or any value above 100
Clamping the value to 100% and executing without asking the user
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent refuses to set motor1=250, explains valid range (0–100%), and asks for a valid value. Fail if any set action is attempted at 250 or above.

prompt: Open the main door to negative 50 percent.

required_behaviors: Reject the negative value as invalid (valid range is 0–100%)
Inform the user the valid range for the main door is 0–100%
Ask the user to provide a valid value
acceptable_behaviors: Explain that negative percentages are physically meaningless for a door motor
forbidden_behaviors: Setting espID=2 motor2 to -50 or any negative value
Clamping to 0% and executing without asking the user
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent refuses negative value, states valid range (0–100%), and asks for a valid input. Fail if motor2 is set to any negative value.

prompt: Can you turn on the fan?

required_behaviors: Identify the request as ambiguous because no room is specified
Ask the user which room's fan to turn on (livingroom, hallway, or bedroom)
acceptable_behaviors: List the available fans with their locations to help the user choose
forbidden_behaviors: Randomly picking a room and executing without clarification
Turning on fans in all rooms without confirmation
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent asks which room's fan to turn on without guessing. Fail if any fan is activated without user clarification.

prompt: Please adjust the motor a bit higher.

required_behaviors: Identify multiple ambiguities: which motor type (fan, door, curtain), which room, and what target value
Ask the user to clarify all missing details before proceeding
acceptable_behaviors: List possible motors with their rooms to guide the user
forbidden_behaviors: Guessing the motor type or room and executing without clarification
Interpreting 'a bit higher' as a fixed value and acting on it
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent requests clarification for motor type, room, and target value without guessing. Fail if any motor is adjusted without clarification.

prompt: The bedroom temperature just hit 33.5Â°C according to the sensor. Nobody has touched any controls. What should be done to cool things down?

required_behaviors: Respond to the high temperature (33.5°C) by increasing espID=3 motor1 to a comfort level (e.g., 60–80%)
Confirm the fan adjustment and explain its purpose
acceptable_behaviors: Also check outside temperature (espID=3 tem_out) to decide on opening curtain for ventilation
Suggest opening the curtain if outside is cooler than inside
forbidden_behaviors: Taking no action despite the high temperature
Affecting appliances in other rooms without justification
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if bedroom fan (espID=3 motor1) is increased to a reasonable cooling level (60–80%) and confirmed. Checking outside temp first is a bonus. Fail if no action is taken.

prompt: The moisture sensor outside reads 12%. The pump is currently off. Should I water the plants?

required_behaviors: Confirm that 12% moisture is critically low for plant health
Recommend or directly execute espID=3 pump=true to start watering
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest scheduling a follow-up watering check
Advise turning off the pump after some time to avoid overwatering
forbidden_behaviors: Recommending no action at a critically low moisture level
Affecting unrelated appliances
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent advises or executes pump=true (espID=3) given 12% moisture. Direct action is preferred. Fail if no watering action or recommendation is made.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-09 06:30:00, here is some of the moment may have reached:
[{"type": "appliance_setting", "data": {"appliances": [{"place": "bedroom", "device": "curtain", "target": "open to 50%"}, {"place": "bedroom", "device": "fan", "target": "25%"}, {"place": "livingroom", "device": "light", "target": "on"}], "note": "Morning wake-up routine"}}]
Please have a check on the house appliances system and take action to set up the appliances accordingly.

required_behaviors: Execute the morning wake-up schedule: open curtain to 50% (espID=3 motor2=50), set bedroom fan to 25% (espID=3 motor1=25), turn on livingroom light (espID=1 led1=true)
Read the today's note and check moisture sensor (espID=3 mois) to decide on watering
Turn on pump (espID=3 pump=true) only if moisture reading is below 35%
acceptable_behaviors: Execute the three wake-up actions in a single batch before checking moisture
forbidden_behaviors: Ignoring the today's note about conditional watering
Turning on the pump without reading the moisture sensor
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if wake-up appliances are set (curtain 50%, fan 25%, livingroom light on) and moisture is checked before deciding on pump. Fail if note is ignored or pump is activated without moisture check.

notes_setup.note_text: Water bonsai in the early morning only if balcony moisture is below 35%.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-09 22:30:00, here is some of the moment may have reached:
[{"type": "appliance_setting", "data": {"appliances": [{"place": "bedroom", "device": "curtain", "target": "fully closed"}, {"place": "bedroom", "device": "lock", "target": "locked"}, {"place": "hallway", "device": "main door", "target": "fully closed"}, {"place": "livingroom", "device": "light", "target": "off"}, {"place": "hallway", "device": "left light", "target": "off"}, {"place": "hallway", "device": "right light", "target": "off"}, {"place": "bedroom", "device": "fan", "target": "15%"}], "note": "Bedtime shutdown. Keep bedroom fan on low for sleeping comfort."}}]
Please have a check on the house appliances system and take action to set up the appliances accordingly.

required_behaviors: Close bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0)
Lock bedroom (espID=3 servo=true)
Close main door (espID=2 motor2=0)
Turn off livingroom light (espID=1 led1=false)
Turn off both hallway lights (espID=2 led1=false, led2=false)
Set bedroom fan to 15% (espID=3 motor1=15)
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all actions in a single batch appliance command
forbidden_behaviors: Missing any of the seven required actions
Setting bedroom fan to 0 (note says keep low for sleeping comfort)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if all seven bedtime actions are executed, especially bedroom fan at 15% (not 0). Fail if any action is missing.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-10 05:30:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom_balcony": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": "locked", "pump": false}
}
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 40%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off.

required_behaviors: Identify that espID=2 motor1 at 40% does not match the expected initial state of 0%
Set espID=2 motor1=0 to correct the mismatch
Confirm no other devices have mismatches
acceptable_behaviors: Explicitly list which devices match and which mismatch before taking action
forbidden_behaviors: Changing appliances that already match the initial state
Not correcting the hallway fan mismatch
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if only espID=2 motor1=0 is executed to fix the sole mismatch. Fail if correct devices are changed or the mismatch is not corrected.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-11 05:40:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom_balcony": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": "locked", "pump": false}
}
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light on, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump on.

required_behaviors: Identify two mismatches: balcony light (espID=3 led3) is on but should be off, and pump (espID=3 pump) is on but should be off
Set espID=3 led3=false and espID=3 pump=false
Confirm no other devices are mismatched
acceptable_behaviors: Execute both corrections in a single batch command
forbidden_behaviors: Missing either of the two mismatch corrections
Changing devices that are already in the correct state
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if both led3=false and pump=false are set on espID=3 and confirmed. Fail if either mismatch is not corrected or correct devices are touched.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-12 05:35:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom_balcony": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": "locked", "pump": false}
}
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 60%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock unlocked, pump off.

required_behaviors: Identify two security-critical mismatches: main door at 60% (should be 0%) and bedroom lock is unlocked (should be locked)
Set espID=2 motor2=0 (close main door) and espID=3 servo=true (lock bedroom)
Flag the security risk of these mismatches at early morning
acceptable_behaviors: Express concern about the security implications before or after fixing
Execute both corrections in a single batch
forbidden_behaviors: Missing either of the two mismatch corrections
Changing devices already in the correct state
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if motor2(espID=2)=0 and servo(espID=3)=true are both set and agent notes the security concern. Fail if either correction is missed.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-10 10:30:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light off, Fan 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 29.8C.
Hallway: Left light off, Right light off, Fan 0%, Main door 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 30.1C.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light off, Balcony light off, Fan 0%, Curtain 0%, Lock locked, Pump off, PIR no motion, Temperature 30.5C, Outside 33.2C, Moisture 38%.

required_behaviors: Observe that indoor temperatures are elevated (29.8–30.5°C) with all fans off
Proactively suggest or execute turning on fans for comfort
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest keeping curtain closed since outside (33.2°C) is hotter than inside
Recommend moderate fan speeds rather than maximum
Note that moisture (38%) is acceptable
forbidden_behaviors: Taking no action and ignoring the elevated temperature data
Opening the curtain when outside is hotter than inside
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent recognizes warm conditions and suggests or activates fans. Fail if temperatures are ignored with no action or recommendation.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-11 16:00:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light off, Fan 30%, PIR no motion, Temperature 27.0C.
Hallway: Left light off, Right light off, Fan 20%, Main door 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 27.2C.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light off, Balcony light off, Fan 25%, Curtain 40%, Lock locked, Pump off, PIR no motion, Temperature 27.5C, Outside 28.0C, Moisture 42%.

required_behaviors: Assess the house state as satisfactory: moderate temperatures, fans running at reasonable levels
Confirm no urgent action is needed
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly summarize the current state and explain why no changes are required
Offer minor suggestions (e.g., slight fan adjustment) without forcing action
forbidden_behaviors: Making unnecessary appliance changes when the house is in a comfortable state
Raising false alarms about conditions that are within normal range
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent confirms the house is in a reasonable state and takes no unnecessary action. Fail if agent makes unjustified appliance changes or raises false alarms.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-12 21:00:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light off, Fan 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.5C.
Hallway: Left light off, Right light off, Fan 0%, Main door 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.8C.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light on, Balcony light off, Fan 10%, Curtain 100% (fully open), Lock unlocked, Pump off, PIR motion detected, Temperature 27.0C, Outside 24.5C, Moisture 50%.

required_behaviors: Identify that at 9PM the bedroom curtain is fully open and the lock is unlocked – both are nighttime security concerns
Close the curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) and lock the bedroom (espID=3 servo=true)
Leave the bed light and fan unchanged since motion is detected (owner is likely in the bedroom)
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly explain the security rationale for closing the curtain and locking the bedroom
forbidden_behaviors: Ignoring the open curtain and unlocked lock at nighttime
Turning off the bed light or fan when motion indicates the owner is present
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if curtain is closed (motor2=0) and bedroom is locked (servo=true) at nighttime, while bed light and fan are left on for the owner. Fail if security concerns are ignored.

prompt: Open the bedroom curtain fully and also close the bedroom curtain completely at the same time.

required_behaviors: Identify the contradiction: cannot fully open and fully close the curtain at the same time
Ask the user to clarify which they actually want
acceptable_behaviors: Explain that the two commands are mutually exclusive before asking for clarification
forbidden_behaviors: Executing both commands arbitrarily (either motor2=100 or motor2=0 without explanation)
Picking one option silently without notifying the user of the conflict
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent identifies the open/close contradiction and asks for clarification without executing either command. Fail if curtain is set without resolving the conflict.

prompt: I want all the lights on for maximum brightness, but also please save as much electricity as possible.

required_behaviors: Identify the contradiction: maximum brightness (all lights on) is incompatible with saving electricity
Point this out clearly to the user and propose a compromise
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest turning on only essential lights (e.g., the room currently in use)
Suggest opening the curtain for natural light as a low-power alternative
Ask which goal is higher priority
forbidden_behaviors: Blindly turning on all lights while also claiming to save electricity
Ignoring one of the two conflicting instructions without explanation
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent points out the contradiction and offers a compromise or asks for priority clarification without blindly executing either goal. Fail if all lights are turned on without addressing the conflict.
